name: query_metrics
description: Run a metrics query (instant or range) against a configured metrics backend such as Prometheus, Thanos, or Mimir.

connector.description: Name of the configured connector to query. Optional when exactly one connector serves this tool.

end.description: Range end as RFC 3339 timestamp or Unix seconds. Requires start and step.

query.description: Query expression in the backend's language, e.g. PromQL.

start.description: Range start as RFC 3339 timestamp or Unix seconds. Omit for an instant query.

step.description: Range resolution as a duration string, e.g. 30s or 5m.
